definition: A table, frame, or case, in past centuries usually with a sloping top but now usually with a flat top, for the use of writers and readers. It often has a drawer or repository underneath.
example: We need to understand the concept of desk.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bàn làm việc.

definition: An item of furniture used to sit on or in, comprising a seat, legs, back, and sometimes arm rests, for use by one person. Compare stool, couch, sofa, settee, loveseat and bench.
example: All I need to weather a snowstorm is hot coffee, a warm fire, a good book and a comfortable chair.
exampleVi: Tất cả những gì tôi cần để vượt qua cơn bão tuyết là cà phê nóng, lửa ấm, một cuốn sách hay và một chiếc ghế êm ái.

definition: A person employed to perform computations; one who computes.
example: We need to understand the concept of computer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về máy tính.

definition: One who makes prints.
example: We need to understand the concept of printer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về máy in.

definition: A sheet material used for writing on or printing on (or as a non-waterproof container), usually made by draining cellulose fibres from a suspension in water.
example: We need to understand the concept of paper.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giấy.

definition: A collection of papers collated and archived together.
example: We need to understand the concept of file.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tập tin.

definition: An organizer that papers are kept in, usually with an index tab, to be stored as a single unit in a filing cabinet.
example: I keep all my schoolwork in a yellow folder.
exampleVi: Tôi giữ tất cả bài tập ở trường của mình trong một tập hồ sơ màu vàng.

definition: An original or official paper used as the basis, proof, or support of anything else, including any writing, book, or other instrument conveying information pertinent to such proof or support.
example: We need to understand the concept of document.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tài liệu.

definition: A storage closet either separate from, or built into, a wall.
example: We need to understand the concept of cabinet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm tủ.

definition: A device for transmitting conversations and other sounds in real time across distances, now often a small portable unit also capable of running software etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of phone.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về điện thoại.

definition: (gerund) The act of persons or things that meet.
example: Meeting him will be exciting. I enjoy meeting new people.
exampleVi: Gặp anh ấy sẽ rất thú vị. Tôi thích gặp gỡ những người mới.

definition: A fellow member of a profession, staff, academic faculty or other organization; an associate.
example: We need to understand the concept of colleague.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đồng nghiệp.

definition: A person whose job is to manage something, such as a business, a restaurant, or a sports team.
example: We need to understand the concept of manager.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người quản lý.

definition: One who directs; the person in charge of managing a department or directorate (e.g., director of engineering), project, or production (as in a show or film, e.g., film director).
example: We need to understand the concept of director.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giám đốc.

definition: (plural staffs or staves) A long, straight, thick wooden rod or stick, especially one used to assist in walking.
example: We need to understand the concept of staff.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhân viên.

definition: An individual who provides labor to a company or another person.
example: One way to encourage your employees to work harder is by giving them incentives.
exampleVi: Một cách để khuyến khích nhân viên của bạn làm việc chăm chỉ hơn là khuyến khích họ.

definition: A fixed amount of money paid to a worker, usually calculated on a monthly or annual basis, not hourly, as wages. Implies a degree of professionalism and/or autonomy.
example: We need to understand the concept of salary.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiền lương.

definition: Something extra that is good; an added benefit.
example: We need to understand the concept of bonus.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiền thưởng.

definition: A slip of paper; a short note.
example: We need to understand the concept of schedule.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lịch trình.

definition: A time limit in the form of a date on or before which something must be completed.
example: I must make this deadline or my boss will kill me!
exampleVi: Tôi phải hoàn thành thời hạn này nếu không sếp sẽ giết tôi!

definition: (etc.) A set of keys used to operate a typewriter, computer etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of keyboard.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bàn phím.

definition: Any small rodent of the genus Mus.
example: We need to understand the concept of mouse.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về chuột.

definition: Someone who watches over something; a person in charge of something or someone.
example: The camp monitors look after the children during the night, when the teachers are asleep.
exampleVi: Những người giám sát trại trông trẻ vào ban đêm, khi các giáo viên đã ngủ.

definition: A device which scans documents in order to convert them to a digital medium.
example: He put the picture in the scanner, then e-mailed a copy of it to his family.
exampleVi: Anh cho bức ảnh vào máy scan rồi gửi một bản sao của nó qua e-mail cho gia đình.

definition: A copy made using a photocopier.
example: We need to understand the concept of photocopy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm photocopy.

definition: A device which binds together sheets of paper by driving a thin metal staple through the sheets and simultaneously folding over the ends of the staple against the back surface of the paper.
example: We need to understand the concept of stapler.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về máy dập ghim.

definition: A paper or cardboard wrapper used to enclose small, flat items, especially letters, for mailing.
example: We need to understand the concept of envelope.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phong bì.

definition: A desktop computer, normally more powerful than a normal PC and often dedicated to a specific task, such as graphics
example: We need to understand the concept of workstation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm máy trạm.

definition: The state of being productive, fertile or efficient
example: We need to understand the concept of productivity.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm năng suất.

definition: The extent to which time is well used for the intended task.
example: The efficiency of the planning department is deplorable.
exampleVi: Hiệu quả của bộ phận kế hoạch là rất kém.

definition: An employee (such as a secretary) who works in reception (receiving visitors and/or calls) for a person or business, especially an office.
example: We need to understand the concept of receptionist.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lễ tân.

definition: The woody part of a tree arising from the trunk and usually dividing.
example: We need to understand the concept of branch.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhánh.

definition: (systems theory) An underlying base or foundation especially for an organization or system.
example: The parasitic tyranny's infrastructure depends on secrecy in order to be effective.
exampleVi: Cơ sở hạ tầng của chế độ chuyên chế ký sinh phụ thuộc vào tính bí mật để có hiệu quả.

definition: The military installation from which troops are commanded and orders are issued; the military unit consisting of a commander and his support staff.
example: We need to understand the concept of headquarters.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trụ sở chính.

definition: Someone entrusted with a secret; a confidant.
example: We need to understand the concept of secretary.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thư ký.

definition: The act or process of dividing anything.
example: We need to understand the concept of division.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phép chia.

definition: A part, portion, or subdivision.
example: We need to understand the concept of department.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phòng ban.

definition: One who occupationally works with records, accounts, letters, etc.; an office worker.
example: We need to understand the concept of clerk.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thư ký.

definition: A copy or reproduction.
example: We need to understand the concept of facsimile.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm fax.

definition: A pair of headphones or earphones, or a singular headphone or earphone, typically with an attached microphone.
example: We need to understand the concept of headset.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tai nghe.

definition: A person who is authorized to supervise, direct or administer something.
example: We need to understand the concept of superintendent.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giám đốc.

definition: To work from home, sometimes for part of a working day or week, using a computer connected to one's employer's network or via the Internet.
example: We need to understand the concept of telecommute.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm làm việc từ xa.

definition: Of or relating to the science of ergonomics.
example: We need to understand the concept of ergonomic.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về công thái học.

definition: A small, folded, wire or plastic device used to hold sheets of paper together.
example: We need to understand the concept of paperclip.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kẹp giấy.

definition: A book for keeping notes, especially one for keeping accounting records; a record book, a register.
example: We need to understand the concept of ledger.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sổ cái.

definition: A short report, especially one released through official channels to be broadcast or publicized.
example: We need to understand the concept of bulletin.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bản tin.

vietnamese: hệ thống liên lạc nội bộ
definition: An electronic communication system, especially one between rooms in a building
example: emergency intercom
exampleVi: liên lạc khẩn cấp

definition: To commit (official papers) to some office.
example: We need to understand the concept of filing.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nộp đơn.

definition: The charge for posting an item.
example: We need to understand the concept of postage.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bưu chính.

definition: An upright frame, typically on three legs, for displaying or supporting something, such as an artist's canvas.
example: We need to understand the concept of easel.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giá vẽ.

definition: A person or business that sells stationery.
example: We need to understand the concept of stationer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm máy trạm.

definition: An elastic band made of rubber.
example: We need to understand the concept of rubberband.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dây cao su.

definition: The act of sound transmission via the electromagnetic spectrum.
example: We need to understand the concept of telephony.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về điện thoại.

definition: A small nail-like tack with a slightly rounded head that can be pressed into place with light pressure from the thumb; used for hanging light articles on a wall or noticeboard.
example: We need to understand the concept of thumbtack.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đinh bấm.

definition: The electronic panel that is used to direct telephone calls to the desired recipient.
example: We need to understand the concept of switchboard.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm tổng đài.

definition: The science of the design of equipment, especially so as to reduce operator fatigue, discomfort and injury.
example: Ergonomics is increasingly important in office-product design.
exampleVi: Công thái học ngày càng quan trọng trong thiết kế sản phẩm văn phòng.
